accurate.why: All claims align with the bill text and verified context; the RMPA related to coal leasing on BLM lands and the GAO/CRA details are accurate.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; BLM, GAO, CRA, and dates are all correct, and the GAO conclusion that the RMPA is a CRA-subject rule is verified.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the purpose as a CRA disapproval to nullify the BLM Miles City RMP Amendment.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Explains the resolution nullifies the BLM rule under the CRA, giving it no force or effect.

exceptions_conditions.why: The resolution contains no material exceptions or conditions, which the summary correctly notes.

effective_dates.why: Correctly states passage dates and the December 11, 2025 enactment date.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the essential operative effect—disapproval and nullification of the specified rule.

objective_tone.why: Neutral and non-partisan throughout, with no editorializing.

coherent.why: Well-organized, internally consistent, and clearly written.

concise.why: Appropriately brief without padding or repetition.

correct_entities.why: BLM, GAO, and the Congressional Review Act are all correctly identified.

correct_figures.why: All dates stated (Nov. 20, 2024; June 25, 2025; passage and enactment dates) match the bill text and record.
